query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS statements_of_work (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sowNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  contractId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  scope TEXT,
  deliverables TEXT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending_approval', 'active', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'on_hold') DEFAULT 'draft',
  startDate DATE,
  endDate DATE,
  estimatedHours DECIMAL(10,2),
  actualHours DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  fixedPrice DECIMAL(12,2),
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(10,2),
  budgetAmount DECIMAL(12,2),
  amountBilled DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  amountPaid DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  milestones TEXT,
  acceptanceCriteria TEXT,
  projectManagerId INT,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt DATETIME,
  completedAt DATETIME,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS statements_of_work (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sowNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  contractId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  scope TEXT,
  deliverables TEXT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending_approval', 'active', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'on_hold') DEFAULT 'draft',
  startDate DATE,
  endDate DATE,
  estimatedHours DECIMAL(10,2),
  actualHours DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  fixedPrice DECIMAL(12,2),
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(10,2),
  budgetAmount DECIMAL(12,2),
  amountBilled DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  amountPaid DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  milestones TEXT,
  acceptanceCriteria TEXT,
  projectManagerId INT,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt DATETIME,
  completedAt DATETIME,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
